TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.EnableOverlay.H: Enables The Old World Combat Overlay token UI.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.OverlayEna: Overlay enabled: wounds, resilience, and status highlights.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.ModuleApiU: The Old World Combat Overlay module API is unavailable.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.ApiUnavail: Ability test API is unavailable for this actor.
Skill test API is unavailable for this actor.
Condition add API is unavailable for this actor.
Condition remove API is unavailable for this actor.
Damage application API is unavailable for this actor.
Wound API is unavailable for this actor.
Stagger choice API is unavailable for this actor.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.Defence.No: {actorName}: no rollable skills or characteristics found.
{actorName}: no rollable skills found for default defence roll.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Wounds.Title: Wounds
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Wounds.Descript: Left-click adds 1 wound. Right-click removes 1 wound.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Attack.Title: Attack
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Attack.Descript: Attack roll. Left-click attacks. Drag to a target for quick targeting. Hold Shift for manual mode.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Defence.Title: Defence
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Defence.Descrip: Defence roll. Left-click defends. Hold Shift for manual mode.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.RollModifier.De: Left-click adds 1 bonus die. Right-click adds 1 penalty die. Shift + left-click cycles Common, Glorious, and Grim.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Resilience.Desc: Resilience value used for durability and damage resolution thresholds.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.ActorType.Stand: Standard NPC type without wound thresholds.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.ActorType.Champ: Champions do not use wound thresholds and track wounds normally.
